references.caption:
🛌 "낮잠도 잘못 자면 독이다"
아무렇게나 자는 낮잠이 오히려 몸을 망친다고요? 😱
9가지 위험한 낮잠 습관, 지금 바로 확인해보세요 👆

#낮잠 #건강정보 #건강꿀팁
references.style_notes: Video content about dangerous nap habits - 9-item checklist format. Topic: Sleep health, nap mistakes. Keywords: '낮잠', '9가지', '위험한'. Matches target keywords: body signals, checklists, doctor advice.

filtering_notes.reason: Video format (clips) but content matches health information criteria - '9가지 위험한 낮잠 습관' is a structured checklist format. May contain illustrated frames but requires visual verification.
filtering_notes.recommended_action: Manual review needed to confirm if video contains illustrated health cards or is live-action footage

collection_notes.cdn_access_issue: Instagram CDN (fbcdn.net) blocked direct curl requests with connection timeout
recommendations: Use Instagram official API with authentication
Use browser automation (Playwright/Puppeteer) with session cookies
Consider alternative scraping methods with proper authentication
